text:
The current goal distance is 2267 cm (far) and the bearing is -168 degrees. A bearing of -168 degrees indicates the goal is almost directly behind the agent (180 degrees is directly behind). 

Looking at the navigation skills:
- Skill 8: "When behind_right & far: avoid TURN_LEFT".
- The bearing -168 is slightly to the right of directly behind (-180). This corresponds to "behind_right".
- Since the goal is far and behind, moving forward would take me further away. I need to turn around.
- To face a target at -168 degrees from my current 0 degrees, I need to rotate roughly 168 degrees.
- Turning right (positive rotation) or left (negative rotation) will help.
- If I turn right, I move towards +30, +60... eventually +180.
- If I turn left, I move towards -30, -60... eventually -180.
- The target is at -168. Turning left seems more direct to reach -168 than turning right to +192 (which is equivalent
